attacking_style: Veteran opportunist who attacks solo with ~12km remaining on penultimate climbs, exploiting transitions when early breaks are caught. Prefers medium-length efforts over sustained grinding.
team_tactics: Operates independently without significant team support; takes yellow jerseys via breakaway collaboration rather than domestique-led setups. Minimal reliance on teammates for positioning or tempo.
terrain_preference: Excels on technical uphill finishes and medium mountain stages with multiple shorter climbs. Exposed on sustained steep gradients (6%+ average) and time trials where age-related decline is evident.
vulnerability: Time trials consistently cause GC losses (1:15+ gaps). Sustained steep climbing leads to cracking; dropped on Turini and 4-minute losses on longer climbs. Extended early efforts result in poor finishes.
key_patterns: Attacks with exactly 12km remaining on penultimate climbs when early breaks caught (2+ wins)
Time trial weakness costs 1:15-4:00 repeatedly, undermining GC ambitions despite strong road racing
Breakaway collaboration over team support: takes GC positions opportunistically without domestiques (3+ instances)
Age-related cracking on sustained steep gradients; dropped on Turini, 4-minute losses on extended climbs
Technical positioning skills remain sharp: contests reduced sprint groups, defends yellow through positioning
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 Tour shows significant decline—cracked badly after breakaway attempt, finished only 12th. Age (40+) increasingly limiting sustained efforts.
